steps.title: Use the source-material clue
steps.content: The sentence says Marisol Vega draws from childhood memories in Texas and details of her current surroundings in California. Those direct experiences supply material for her paintings, illustrations, and public artworks.

steps.title: Choose the creative link
steps.content: Choice A is illogical because direct experience cannot compliment an artist. Choice B suggests doubt, and Choice C suggests direct experience has no effect on her. The passage instead shows experience as the source that motivates the work. The answer is D.
